title: Perstige
description: A mod where I add all of the stupid weapon ideas that do not fit in other mods
body:
This mod is adds the weapons that I could not fit into other mods. Most weapons stay somewhat fair, some do not...

This mod currently adds

-10+ weapons

-2 status effects

-plenty of unique projectiles

Including some fun addtions such as

- Nuclear weaponary
- Airstrikes
- A few guns
- Some daggers and knifes
- Pipebomb...

Most items have unquie 3d models!

-Rasberrypi
